items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1.8 miles north of Exit 13: TO I-76 / PA-291 WEST VALLEY FORGE and 2.1 miles north of Exit 13: TO I-76 / PA-291 WEST VALLEY FORGE. There is a lane restriction.
